description_long: This object is a decorative banner composed of several small, rectangular flags strung along a thin, taut line. Each flag features a colorful design, with a mix of blue and brown backgrounds and what appear to be circular or emblematic illustrations in the center. The flags are evenly spaced and hang vertically from the string, creating a festive and eye-catching display. The string itself is thin and barely visible, suggesting a lightweight construction. The banner is likely made from fabric or lightweight plastic, suitable for temporary outdoor or indoor use. The overall appearance is cheerful and designed to attract attention, making it ideal for events or celebrations in urban environments.
description: A festive string banner with multiple colorful, rectangular flags featuring circular designs, suspended along a thin line. The flags alternate in blue and brown tones, creating a vibrant and decorative display.
description_view_0: The banner is seen from the front, showing all the flags with their colorful designs clearly visible and evenly spaced along the string.
description_view_1: The banner is viewed from the side, making the string and flags appear as a thin vertical line with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: The banner is shown from the back, with the flags and their designs still visible but mirrored, maintaining the same spacing and color arrangement.
description_view_3: The banner is again viewed from the side, similar to view 1, with the string and flags appearing as a thin vertical line.
